title: Info Hud
description: InfoHUD is a Minecraft Fabric mod, It provides FPS, coordinates, day count, world or server name, vehicle speed, elytra speed, and more on your HUD.
body:
InfoHUD is a Minecraft Fabric mod, It provides FPS, coordinates, day count, world or server name, vehicle speed, elytra speed, and more on your HUD.

**Features:**
- FPS
- Cordinates
- Day count
- World name
- Server name
- Vehicle speed
- Elytra speed
  
**Dependencies:**
- Cloth config (required)
- Mod menu (required)
- Fabric API (required)

**Config:**
- Currently you can only disable huds like FPS, Coordinates in the mod config through mod menu.
